critical_issues.title: Idempotency-Key not enforced on SubmitHandler
critical_issues.detail: submit_handler.go line 19 had `_ = idempotencyKey` — key extracted but silently ignored. Missing key returned no error, violating idempotency contract. FIXED inline: now returns 400 ErrIdempotencyRequired when header absent.

important_issues.title: SubmitResponse.ETag field left empty in body
important_issues.detail: ETag is correctly set as HTTP response header but contracts.SubmitResponse.ETag field is written as empty string in JSON body. Minor inconsistency — clients should use the header, but the body field is misleading.
important_issues.fix: Set ETag field to same value as header: `ETag: `"v" + strconv.Itoa(expectedRevisionVersion+1) + "`"`

important_issues.title: Idempotency key not stored or replayed — table exists but middleware absent
important_issues.detail: Migration 0147 created metaldocs.idempotency_keys table. Handlers extract Idempotency-Key and enforce presence, but no middleware reads/writes the table for actual replay. Duplicate keys get reprocessed rather than returning cached response. Full idempotency store integration deferred.
important_issues.fix: Phase 8 janitor task references this; add idempotency middleware in Phase 7 follow-up or Phase 8.

minor_issues.title: ListRoutesHandler returns hardcoded empty response
minor_issues.detail: Stubbed — returns {routes:[], total:0}. Acceptable for now; full implementation requires ApprovalRepository.ListRoutes method not yet in interface.

minor_issues.title: InboxHandler.ListPendingForActor is a stub
minor_issues.detail: ReadService.ListPendingForActor returns empty slice with TODO comment. Inbox query requires stage membership join not yet implemented in repository.

minor_issues.title: GetInstanceHandler ETag always `v1`
minor_issues.detail: Instance revision version not tracked in domain.Instance; ETag hardcoded to `"v1"`. Full versioning requires revision_version column on approval_instances.

quality_checks.1_handler_thinness: PASS — no tx, no repo calls in any handler. All handlers delegate to services via interfaces.
quality_checks.2_idempotency_enforcement: PASS (after CRIT-001 fix) — all mutating POST/PUT/DELETE handlers now enforce Idempotency-Key presence, returning 400 ErrIdempotencyRequired when absent.
quality_checks.3_if_match_enforcement: PASS — parseIfMatch returns errIfMatchRequired (→428) when header missing, errIfMatchMalformed (→400) when malformed. Wildcard `*` accepted (version=0). Applied on all non-create mutators.
quality_checks.4_error_mapper_completeness: PASS — MapErrorToResponse uses errors.Is for sentinels and errors.As for struct types (ErrCapabilityDenied, *json.SyntaxError, *json.UnmarshalTypeError). Covers all 21 domain errors in matrix.
quality_checks.5_5xx_sanitization: PASS — responseMessage() returns `internal error` literal for statusCode >= 500. Raw DB/stack text never reaches response body.
quality_checks.6_strictjson_usage: PASS — all body-decoding handlers use contracts.Decode(r, &req). No raw json.NewDecoder used in handlers.
quality_checks.7_content_type_enforcement: PASS — contracts.Decode checks Content-Type via mime.ParseMediaType; non-application/json returns ErrContentType → 415.
quality_checks.8_body_size_limit: PASS — contracts.Decode uses io.LimitReader(r.Body, 64KB+1); overflow returns ErrBodyTooLarge → 413.
quality_checks.9_request_id_propagation: PASS — all WriteError calls pass reqID from requestID(r); body.RequestID set before WriteJSON.
quality_checks.10_etag_emission: PASS — SubmitHandler sets ETag header on 201. GetInstanceHandler sets ETag header and body field. Other mutators do not yet emit new ETag (deferred — requires post-mutation version read).
quality_checks.11_test_coverage: PASS — submit: 7 cases, signoff: 5 cases, publish: 4+4 cases, supersede: 4, obsolete: 4, cancel: 4, get-instance: 3, inbox: 3, route-admin: 6. All handlers have ≥4 cases except read handlers (3 each — acceptable for stubs).
quality_checks.12_openapi_completeness: PASS — spec2.yaml (1081 lines) documents all 13 routes, shared headers (Idempotency-Key, If-Match, X-Tenant-ID, X-User-ID, ETag, Idempotent-Replay), shared schemas (ErrorResponse, StageRequest/Response, RouteResponse, InstanceResponse, PaginatedInbox), and all error codes.

fixes_required.description: Enforce Idempotency-Key presence — APPLIED (was `_ = idempotencyKey`; now returns 400 if empty)
Set SubmitResponse.ETag field to match the ETag header value (currently empty string in body)
Add idempotency middleware that reads/writes metaldocs.idempotency_keys for true replay support
